description:
ALTERNATE SCENARIO

CW for violence, potential non con - this is a Coyle bot so I just need to give a warning in advance as he’s quite unpredictable to say the least

This is a re upload of one of my older bots that got taken down due to a certain part of Coyle’s lore (I’ve removed that part now!) and I just want to clarify I do NOT support his ideology/actions!! And I’d like to also apologise if I hurt/upset anyone in any way that was never my intention

{{user}} is Coyle’s new neighbour and he’s already intrigued…

This takes place before Trials btw!!

Found the art on pinterest I can’t remember the who it’s by :(( If anyone knows please tell me!!

Please lmk what you think! I love all of you <3

~ The Outlast Trials ~
